privileged_info_summary: Verified patient Horacio Santacruz (ID 20, DOB 1954-02-19) exists in the freemed environment database (patients.sql), and the patient's email confirms Synthea as the data source. The task requires the agent to add a clinical SOAP note detailing subjective (post-MI follow-up, fatigue, shortness of breath), objective (BP 148/92, HR 78 bpm, lungs clear), assessment (Ischemic heart disease, post-MI), and plan (aspirin, statin, cardiac rehab, 4 weeks follow-up). The claim that these medical conditions exist in an original generated clinical record cannot be independently verified as the raw source files are not provided.
